name: Gold Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add well-beaten egg yolks to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients alternately with milk to the creamed mixture. Mix until just combined.
5. Stir in the grated lemon rind.
6. Pour the batter into well-oiled layer cake pans.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for a few minutes before removing them and assembling with lemon filling between layers.
9. Cover the assembled cake with seven-minute icing.
